title: neolitsea calcicola
intro: Neolitsea calcicola, a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, is native to the subtropical forests of China. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, and its leaves and bark are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Neolitsea calcicola include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
